creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
In this build https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-main-amd64-test/19327/
(likely after base 63b3c1c77036814c85d36fe7a48c704db7c6fc9c )

# dtrace -n 'syscall:::entry { @[execname, probefunc] = count(); }' -c "echo hello"
dtrace: invalid probe specifier syscall:::entry { @[execname, probefunc] = count(); }: "/usr/lib/dtrace/ipfw.d", line 1: cannot find type: struct ip_fw_args*: Conflicting type is already defined
